posts.author: edmonds (Edmond Shapiro)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently there is no way to enforce rules on data entry.

Proposed solution:

a) Action to dynamically display pop-up with message.
b) Ability to check the existence of a value in a column

  • Required to avoid running an automation as well as to display a popup
    c) Ability to check existing of a specific value in a column (as well as a formula column)
  • Formula column would allow true false verification of information entered in multiple columns such as email address and verification email address.
